implemented: APP_VERSION set to v1 and displayed as Flashcard Pro v1 in title/status bar.
Dynamic German-only synonyms integrated with OpenThesaurus API.
Synonyms render at the bottom of the flashcard with the label (Synonyme).
Audio keepalive enhanced with AudioContext, silent audio loop, MediaSession, and speechSynthesis hook.
important_limitations: The supplied Python snippets were adapted to the actual app stack: static HTML/CSS/vanilla JavaScript PWA.
OpenThesaurus calls require internet access and browser CORS availability; if the request fails, the synonym box is hidden gracefully.
Mobile browser/PWA locked-screen TTS remains best-effort. Guaranteed screen-off playback requires native app background audio or pre-generated/bundled audio.
